topStories.description: The Congress will try to push for 33% women’s reservation within the existing 543 seats in the Lok Sabha and push the government to delay the proposed delimitation exercise for a more equitable distribution of seats, rather than a 50% proportional increase in every state’s parliamentary strength.

topStories.title: Prime Minister Modi to head 126-member panel for Phule’s 200th birth anniversary
topStories.description: The committee, however, doesn’t include Lok Sabha’s Leader of the Opposition (LoP) Rahul Gandhi and Congress president and Rajya Sabha LoP Mallikarjun Kharge.

topStories.title: US Considers Another Round Of Talks With Iran As Ceasefire Deadline Looms
topStories.description: Iran War: The officials are reviewing potential dates and locations, contingent on the progress of ongoing talks with Iran and regional mediators in the coming days.

topStories.title: Can’t accept settlement benefits then initiate fresh legal proceedings: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The Supreme Court ruled that parties in matrimonial disputes can't withdraw from mediated settlements without valid reasons, emphasizing the importance of upholding agreements.

topStories.title: Energy prices rise despite Jones Act suspension by Trump
topStories.description: Shipping costs have increased by more than 10 percent in the past month due to the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: New White House report has plans to fix US housing shortage of 10 million
topStories.description: A new report lays out a blueprint for how more home construction would help the middle class and the overall economy.

topStories.title: Judge dismisses Trump’s $10 billion defamation suit against Wall Street Journal over Epstein report
topStories.description: The case now moves to the next phase, where Trump may attempt to refile a revised complaint before the court deadline.

topStories.title: Eric Swalwell faces House Ethics probe following sexual assault allegations and Governor race exit
topStories.description: The move comes just one day after Swalwell suspended his campaign for California governor following the emergence of allegations he denies.

topStories.title: Three held for murder of forest guard who tried to stop sand mafia tractor; two linked to BJP
topStories.description: The prime accused’s arrest comes on a day when the Supreme Court slammed the governments Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan over the rampant illegal sand mining in the National Chambal Gharial Sanctuary and nearby regions

topStories.title: Trump Says He Hasn't Spoken With Xi Jinping On Iran War
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday said that he has not spoken with Chinese President Xi Jinping, while reiterating that the United States shares a "very good relationship" with China.

topStories.title: Bernie Sanders vows to push resolution to block US weapons to Israel
topStories.description: Bill is unlikely to pass in Republican-controlled Senate, but it could test waning support for Israel among Democrats.

dailyNews.title: Hezbollah leader urges Lebanon’s government to pull out of Israel talks

dailyNews.title: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive — listen now
dailyNews.description: Chicago-based music superfan Aadam Jacobs has been recording the concerts he goes to since the 1980s, amassing an archive of over 10,000 tapes.

dailyNews.title: Brazilian ex-intelligence chief detained by US immigration authorities
dailyNews.description: Brazilian media reports that Alexandre Ramagem fled the country after being convicted for involvement in coup plot.

dailyNews.title: Three Tankers Clear Hormuz as Other Ships Abandon Passage
dailyNews.description: Three tankers — the first to attempt a transit of the Strait of Hormuz since the US announced a blockade — have successfully cleared the waterway. After sailing near the Iranian coast, the trio have now emerged into open waters.

dailyNews.title: Trump Deletes Jesus Post Of Himself After Outcry
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday deleted a social media image apparently depicting him as Jesus after an outcry from religious leaders that he was being blasphemous.

dailyNews.title: Trump receives McDonald’s delivery at Oval Office in staged-style event promoting 'No Tax on Tips' law
dailyNews.description: The delivery was made by Sharon Simmons who wore a red “DoorDash Grandma” T-shirt as she arrived at the White House. “This doesn’t look staged, does it,” Trump joked as cameras captured the moment.

dailyNews.title: Trump deletes image of himself as Jesus-like savior after backlash
dailyNews.description: Trump draws criticism from church leaders and conservatives over AI-Jesus image and pope remarks.

dailyNews.title: Hezbollah rejects Lebanon’s direct negotiations with Israel
dailyNews.description: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem has urged Lebanon to cancel a planned Washington meeting with Israeli representatives.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court expresses ‘shock’ at the impunity of Chambal sand miners
dailyNews.description: The Bench further suggested that a GPS system could be installed in heavy earth-moving machines in the area to keep a track of their movement

dailyNews.title: Trump doubles down in Pope feud, refuses to apologise
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump says he won't apologise after attacking Pope Leo XIV as “WEAK”.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran has reached out for deal as US blockade of Strait of Hormuz takes effect
dailyNews.description: The President remarked that “they'd like to make a deal very badly,” during a briefing to reporters at Oval Office in the White House.

dailyNews.title: DMK-Congress alliance: A flawed beginning and lack of cohesion
dailyNews.description: After tense seat-sharing talks with the DMK, Congress is lethargic in campaigning for T.N. polls

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran wants ‘peace deal’ but insists on ‘no nukes’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump says Iran wants to make a peace deal “very badly” after talks in Islamabad ended without agreement.

dailyNews.title: 'He's Wrong, Very Weak On Crime': Trump Refuses To Apologise To Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: "There's nothing to apologise for. He's wrong," Trump told reporters, a day after a social media post and comments slamming the US-born pope.

dailyNews.title: DoorDash driver hails key Trump policy after delivering McDonald's to White House: 'I'm going to enjoy it'
dailyNews.description: DoorDash driver Sharron Simmons says she hopes Trump's no-tax-on-tips benefit in the One Big Beautiful Bill extends beyond its current 2028 expiration.

dailyNews.title: Gabbard claims ‘coordinated effort’ by intelligence community to advance narrative to impeach Trump
dailyNews.description: DNI Tulsi Gabbard releases declassified testimony she says exposes a coordinated effort to manufacture a narrative behind Trump's first impeachment.

dailyNews.title: Butler man’s online rants to kill Trump end in guilty plea after FBI probe
dailyNews.description: Shawn Monper pleaded guilty to making threats to assassinate President Trump and kill ICE agents in posts on YouTube, according to the Justice Department.

dailyNews.title: San Diego taco chain targeted by boycott over CEO's alleged Trump support
dailyNews.description: Roberto's Taco Shop, a popular San Diego taco chain, faces left-wing backlash after a TikTok user alleged its CEO is a Donald Trump supporter.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s McDonald’s order comes with cash surprise for ‘DoorDash Grandma’ outside White House
dailyNews.description: President Trump received a McDonald's delivery from a DoorDash driver in the Oval Office and tipped her $100 while promoting his no tax on tips policy.

dailyNews.title: Iran Blockade Sets Up a Test of Which Side Can Endure More Pain
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to choke off the country’s lifeline with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. But the Iranians are betting that his tolerance for political pain is limited.

dailyNews.title: What the U.S. Blockade of Iran and the Strait of Hormuz Might Look Like
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military has provided few details on how it might carry out President Trump’s orders as he seeks to pressure Tehran on a peace deal. But history and established practices offer some clues.

dailyNews.title: The U.S. Blockades Iran’s Ports
dailyNews.description: Also, Trump clashes with the pope. Here’s the latest at the end of Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Many Popes Before Leo Have Been Entangled in Politics. Here Are 5 of Them.
dailyNews.description: Leo XIV, under fire from President Trump, has joined predecessors like Francis and John Paul II in confronting political issues.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Erratic Behavior and Extreme Comments Revive Mental Health Debate
dailyNews.description: As the president threatens to wipe out Iran and attacks the pope, even some former allies and advisers are questioning whether he has grown increasingly unbalanced, describing him as “lunatic” and “clearly insane.”
